videos.title: Mini CNC Plotter Servo Test
videos.description: Testing the servo motor responsible for pen lifting and lowering during CNC plotting operations.

videos.title: Mini CNC Plotter Z-Axis Mechanism
videos.description: Demonstration of the Z-axis pen up and down mechanism using a servo motor for automated drawing operations.

videos.title: Mini CNC Plotter Complete Demonstration
videos.description: Complete functional demonstration of the DVD drive based Mini CNC Plotter executing G-code and producing automated drawings.
